_note: Esther pericope → verse-range map (SC-0074; deliberate seed-expansion — court narrative, royal decrees, banquets, the lots/Purim, and the never-named God as a significant_absence goldmine). start/end are HEBREW versification (BHSA-native); bcv is English. Esther's Hebrew and English versification COINCIDE (unlike Jonah at the fish) — no offset.
